title: The Bamboo Blonde
writer: Olive Cooper, Lawrence Kimble, Wayne Whittaker
actors: Frances Langford, Ralph Edwards, Russell Wade
plot: A beautiful blonde singer who has a one-time fling with an engaged pilot, is confused by his B-29 bomber crew to be his real fiancée, and her image ends up being painted on the nose of their aircraft, for good luck, as the "Bamboo...
